name: Delicious Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Key Lime juice or 1 Persian lime juice, strained
1 tsp Grated Key lime or 1 Persian lime peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the gelatin, half of the sugar and salt in a saucepan.
2. In another pan, beat the egg yolks well.
3. Add the lime juice and water to the egg yolk mixture.
4. Stir the egg yolk mixture into the gelatin mixture.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, just until the mixture comes to a boil.
6. Remove from heat; stir in grated peel.
7. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
8. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
9. Gradually add the remaining sugar, beating until stiff.
10. Fold into the chilled gelatin mixture.
11. Fold in whipped cream (reserve some for topping if desired).
12. Pour into the baked crust.
13. Chill until firm.
